titleStmt.title: SII 9.426: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 426. (A.R. No. 396 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE PRAKARA OF THE TEMPLE OF JANARDANA AT YERUMAL, UDIPI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1324, Chitrabhānu, Vaiśākha, śu. 3, Gu[ruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1402 April 6, Thursday. It refers itself to the reign of Harihararāya and records that a gift of some plots of land was made by Gaṇapaṇṇa, son of Lakkhappa of Kaḷalige, for the service of the god Janārdanadēva at Yermmāḷa, after purchasing the land from others. It states that Basavaṇṇa-Oḍeya was then governing the Bārakūra-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pāṁtu vō jaladaśyāmā śārṅgajyāghātakarkaśā trailōkyamaṁṭapa
staṁbhāḥ catvārō haribāhavaḥ . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīraharihararāyaru yēkachatradalli rājyavanu pratipālisu
va kāladalu Avara nirūpadiṁda basuva(m)ṇnaOḍeyaru bārakūra rājya
vanāḷuva kāla svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1324 citrabhānu
saṁvatsarada va . śu 3 . gu . kaḷaligeya lakhkhappagaḷa makkaḷu gaṇapa
ṁṇagaḷu yermmāḷa śrījanārddanadēvara sthānadali māḍida dharmmada krama
veṁteṁdaḍe yermmāḷa Ājaṁtiyāda māraṁmaverggaḍeya
ru Ā Ūra 24 praje jananigaḷu yermmāḷadēvara pādamūligaḷu
yivarellara sanumatadiṁda Avarugaḷu muṁtāgi A gaṇapaṁ
ṇagaḷu Ā pādamūli viṣṇunelli nāraṇanelli kēśavanelli yivaru
gaḷa kayyalli Ardhaparicchēdavāgi mūḷiya haṇa sahitavāgi ko
ṭṭu mūlaparicchēdavāgi dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍa kṣētrada vi
vara yermmāḷadēvālyada �yośā(ṁ)nyada mūleya pāḷa dēvara
majalalu Ā bhomiya catuḥsīme mūḍalu heggaḍeya bāḷiṁ
dalu paḍuvaluḷḷa bayalugadde teṁkalu viṣṇuAggi harihara
paṁḍeya bāḷiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu gaṁgādharaAggiya
beṭṭina paḍuvaṇa bāgila gaddeyiṁda keḷagaṇa Ātana bāgila gadde
sahitavāgi mūḍalu baḍagalu kṛṣṇapaṁḍeya bāḷiṁda teṁka
lu �yo catussīme Oḷaguḷa bāḷu mūḍaṇadikkinalu bayala
gadde bittuva bede mūḍe mataṁ majalagadde 1 kaṁ bede mū 4 A
lliṁda paḍuvalu bāgila gadde 1 kaṁ bittu mū 6 Alliṁda pa
ḍuvalu beṭṭinalu maneṭhāvu kaḷa bāvi keṟe Alliṁda paḍu
valu gaṁgādharaggiya bāgila gadde 1 kaṁ bede mū 3 Aṁ
tu Ī catusīmeya kare mara jala pāṣāṇa nidhi nikṣē
pa sahita mūlavāgi koṁḍa �yo kṣētrakke teṟu dēvasva Anā
ya naṭṭū bēḍu Āudū yillā yeṁdu sarvamā(ṁ)nya
vāgi Ā Ūravaru mārammaverggaḍeyu barasi naḍasi koṭṭa si
lāśāsanada yī kṣētravanu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṁḍu
Ā janārddanadēvara sthānadalli Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi
pratidinadalli Obba brāhmaṇana bhōjanakke Avana mēlu
vecca vīḷeyakke dēvara hāneyali yidakke Akkiya
maryyādeyali prativarṣadali 34 mūḍeyū naḍava
Ā gaṇapaṁṇagaḷu dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭu māḍi
da dharmma yiṁtappudakke Ā Ūra jananiga
janārdanadēvaru māraverggaḍe
janārdanadēvaru Ā pādamūli
yavarellara matadiṁ māra
da baraha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
ti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi
jāyatē krimiḥ . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācchrē
yōnupālanaṁ . dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ
padaṁ . Ārobbarū yī dharmakke Aḷupi kiḍisidaḍe ga
ṁgeya taḍiyalu kapileya koṁda pāpake hōha
ru yī dharmmava pālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyali sāvira
kapileya dānamāḍida phalavahudu yī dharma
va māḍidavarigeU naḍasidavarigeU maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.426 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
